one_time_description: Large deferred revenue recognition/drawdown of $26,984,327 primarily from Indigenous Services Canada ($30,886,767 in deferred ISC funds), resulting in unusually high revenue and surplus for the year
economic_notes: Band is under co-management arrangement. Major capital project underway (secondary school construction $5,562,471 addition). $10M GIC earning 4.7% interest. Economic dependence on Indigenous Services Canada noted.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Band is under co-management. Unusually large revenue spike due to ISC funding of $42.17M versus prior year $5.62M, offset by large deferred revenue negative adjustment of $26.98M. Deferred ISC balance at year end is $30.89M suggesting significant future-period funding already received. Three consolidated funds: Operating, Trust, Social Housing. Prior period adjustment of $111,136 for ISC funding recovery not previously recorded. Secondary school under construction ($7.05M asset, not yet amortized). Long-term debt includes capital leases of $120,007 and mortgage of $223,617. No schedule of remuneration provided. Expenses by object total ($19,568,926) differs significantly from statement of operations total ($8,819,555) — the object schedule appears to include capital purchases and items not in the summary statement. Subcontractors line of $11,331,186 is the largest expense object.
